basic_details.job_title: BVFCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 38 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Brahmaputra Valley Fertilizer Corporation Limited has officially released the Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. BVFCL/Pers/Apprentice/316) for 38 vacancies across its operational units. Eligible candidates with qualifications such as B.E./B.Tech, Diploma, HSLC + ITI, B.Com, B.Sc, or B.A., aged between 18 to 24 years, can apply online on or before 31 July 2026 via the official BVFCL recruitment portal. Selected candidates will be engaged on an apprenticeship basis with a stipend as per applicable apprenticeship rules and government norms.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 24 years Age relaxation: Relaxation by 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer). PwBD candidates upto 10 years (upto 15 years for SC/ST and upto 13 years for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer))

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./ B.Tech, Diploma, HSLC + ITI, B.Com, B.Sc, B.A
qualification.details: Chemical Engineering (B.E./B.Tech): B.E./ B.Tech in Chemical /Production Engineering Chemical Engineering (Diploma): Diploma in Chemical /Production Engineering Mechanical Engineering (B.E./B.Tech): B.E./ B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering Mechanical Engineering (Diploma): Diploma in Mechanical Engineering Trade Apprentice - Machinist: HSLC + ITI (Machinist) Trade Apprentice - Draughtsman (Mechanical): HSLC + ITI Draughtsman (Mechanical) Trade Apprentice - Welder: HSLC + ITI (Welder) Trade Apprentice - Fitter: HSLC + ITI (Fitter) Trade Apprentice - Refrigeration & Air Conditioning Mechanic: HSLC + ITI (Refrigeration & Air Conditioning Mechanic) Trade Apprentice - Mechanic Diesel: HSLC + ITI (Mechanic Diesel) Electrical Engineering (B.E./B.Tech): B.E./ B.Tech in Electrical Engineering Electrical Engineering (Diploma): Diploma in Electrical Engineering Trade Apprentice - Electrician: HSLC + ITI (Electrician/Wireman/ Cable Jointer) Instrumentation/ Electronics and Communication/ Electronics and Telecommunication (B.E./B.Tech): B.E./ B.Tech in Instrumentation/ Electronics and Communication/ Electronics and Telecommunication Instrumentation/ Electronics and Communication/ Electronics and Telecommunication (Diploma): Diploma in Instrumentation/ Electronics and Communication/ Electronics and Telecommunication/ Electrical and Electronics/ Instrumentation and Control/ Electronics Engineering Trade Apprentice - Fitter (Instrumentation): HSLC + ITI (Fitter) Civil Engineering (B.E./B.Tech): B.E./ B.Tech in Civil Engineering Civil Engineering (Diploma): Diploma in Civil Engineering Trade Apprentice - Plumber: HSLC + ITI (Plumber) Trade Apprentice - Draughtsman (Civil): HSLC + ITI Draughtsman (Civil) Fire & Safety Engineering (Diploma): Diploma in Fire & Safety Engineering Finance (B.Com): B.Com Prod/Chemical Lab (B.Sc): B.Sc HR (B.A): B.A

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BVFCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BVFCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BVFCL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BVFCL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BVFCL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BVFCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BVFCL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in BVFCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Brahmaputra Valley Fertilizer Corporation Limited (BVFCL) has announced a total of 38 vacancies for the Apprentice post. This recruitment drive offers various opportunities across different engineering disciplines and trade apprenticeships, as well as roles in Finance, Production/Chemical Lab, and HR.

faq.question: Q2. What are the important dates for BVFCL Apprentice application?
faq.answer: The online application process for BVFCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 begins on 30 June 2026. The last date for submitting online applications is 31 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they apply within this period to be considered.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to BVFCL Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the BVFCL Apprentice posts must be between 18 and 24 years of age. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer), and up to 10 years for PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What qualifications are required for BVFCL Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: A wide range of qualifications are accepted, including B.E./B.Tech in various engineering fields (Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical, Instrumentation, Civil), Diploma in similar disciplines, HSLC with ITI in various trades, B.Com, B.Sc, and B.A degrees.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for BVFCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for the BVFCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Candidates from all categories, including General/OBC and SC/ST, are exempted from paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for BVFCL Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the BVFCL Apprentice posts is entirely online. Interested and eligible candidates must submit their applications through the official website of Brahmaputra Valley Fertilizer Corporation Limited within the specified dates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BVFCL Apprentice Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves registration on the NATS portal (for Graduate/Diploma) or Apprenticeship portal (for ITI), evaluation of aggregate marks in Matriculation and respective discipline, a personal interview, and a pre-employment medical fitness examination.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the BVFCL Apprentice posts be located?
faq.answer: The Brahmaputra Valley Fertilizer Corporation Limited (BVFCL) is located in Namrup, Assam. Therefore, selected candidates for the Apprentice positions will be placed in Namrup, Assam, for their training period.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website to apply for BVFCL Apprentice jobs?
faq.answer: The official website for Brahmaputra Valley Fertilizer Corporation Limited (BVFCL) is www.bvfcl.com. Candidates can find the official notification and the online application link on this website.

faq.question: Q10. What types of Apprentice posts are available in BVFCL?
faq.answer: BVFCL offers various Apprentice posts including Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical, Instrumentation, Civil Engineering (B.E./B.Tech & Diploma), and Trade Apprenticeships like Machinist, Welder, Fitter, Electrician, Plumber, along with Finance, Prod/Chemical Lab, and HR roles.
